$schema_note: Derived catalog. Edit the provenance sources, then run `python3 bin/site.py sync`.

systems.name: akroasis
systems.one_liner: An RF signals toolkit in Rust: a clean-room Meshtastic mesh stack live, CHIRP radio workflows, an encrypted vault, and a 7-domain typed signal contract across 17 declared domains, 11 still stubs.

systems.name: aletheia
systems.one_liner: Self-hosted AI agents with persistent memory. One binary, no containers, no external databases - a knowledge graph that carries forward across sessions.

systems.name: hamma
systems.one_liner: A clean-room Rust implementation of a Tailscale-compatible mesh networking stack. Pre-alpha, actively implementing the peer client against a real reference control plane.
systems.stack: Rust · Noise protocol · WireGuard data plane planned

systems.name: harmonia
systems.one_liner: A self-hosted media platform built to replace a stack of separate *arr-pattern services - one Rust server across 21 crates, collapsing the pattern into one media lifecycle manager.

systems.name: kanon
systems.one_liner: A private standards and dispatch control plane: lint and gate tooling, code intelligence, and PR/issue orchestration with public configuration receipts.

systems.name: logismos
systems.one_liner: A GPU inference stack for transformer embedding models, built from the device upward in Rust and HIP for AMD hardware. CPU correctness proven; GPU cutover waits on hardware access.

systems.name: thumos
systems.one_liner: A bare-metal Rust phone OS for the AGM M7 - no Linux underneath. The kernel boots end-to-end under QEMU, and CI proves it on pushes to main and pull requests targeting main.

systems.name: theatron
systems.one_liner: Desktop UI primitives for the fleet: Dioxus/Blitz components, design tokens, markdown rendering, HTTP/SSE, OS integration.

systems.name: heurema
systems.one_liner: Contracts for vector search, full-text search, persistence, and rank fusion. Reciprocal-rank fusion is implemented; HNSW and BM25 land by extraction from their in-app implementations.

systems.name: sphragis
systems.one_liner: Post-quantum hybrid sealing: an X-Wing KEM (X25519 + ML-KEM-768) with a ChaCha20-Poly1305 envelope, behind an explicit feature flag.

systems.name: koinon
systems.gloss: koinon · κοινόν - that which is shared
systems.one_liner: Fleet-common Rust scaffolding: tracing init, typed errors, config loading, a CLI prelude.

systems.name: epitelesis
systems.one_liner: A typed subprocess wrapper over std and tokio: timeouts as contract, captured output, structured errors.

systems.name: zetesis
systems.one_liner: Budget, cost, citation, and query contracts for agent research pipelines, with a fixture-driven deep-research loop.

systems.name: typikon
systems.gloss: typikon · τυπικόν - the book of order
systems.one_liner: The Zola theme, frontmatter schemas, and CI gate bundle this site itself runs on: CSP enforcement, link checking, accessibility, smoke tests.
systems.badge: PINNED BY COMMIT · NO RELEASE TAG

systems.name: epistole
systems.one_liner: Subscriber lifecycle and archive flows over an embedded store; SMTP delivery is the next phase.

systems.name: pinax
systems.gloss: pinax · πίναξ - the tablet, the register
systems.one_liner: A relational storage engine designed from scratch in Rust: multi-writer MVCC, per-page encryption, a causal changelog as a storage primitive. Design documents only; implementation not started.

systems.name: mneme
systems.one_liner: A Datalog engine for facts, rules, and inference: content-addressed facts, supersede-based retraction, incrementally maintained views. Design documents only; implementation not started.

systems.name: dioptron
systems.gloss: dioptron · δίοπτρον - the instrument through which one sees
systems.one_liner: A specification for a web runtime where operator and agents share one capability surface: browsing, ingesting, querying, acting. Design documents only; implementation not started.
